subject: Data provider 0.7.2 version
commit_message:
Data provider 0.7.2 version

Uses latest onapsdk and fix passing few parameters

Issue-ID: INT-2264
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I73d80a0d81661a6082a04414f2623df3725165cb
